Home / Services / Lighting Services

Lighting Services

Enhance your home with professional lighting solutions from Indy Electric.

From recessed lighting to landscape lighting, Indy Electric offers a wide range of lighting services to enhance the beauty, functionality, and energy efficiency of your home or business. We can help you design and install a lighting system that meets your specific needs and aesthetic preferences.

Our lighting services include:
* Recessed lighting installation
* Chandelier installation
* Track lighting installation
* Under-cabinet lighting installation
* Landscape lighting installation
* Security lighting installation
* Energy-efficient lighting upgrades (LED lighting)

We work with a variety of lighting styles and technologies to create the perfect ambiance for your space. Whether you're looking to brighten up a dark room, highlight architectural features, or create a welcoming outdoor environment, we have the expertise to bring your vision to life. We use high-quality lighting fixtures and follow industry best practices to ensure long-lasting performance and energy savings. Our electricians are skilled in all aspects of lighting installation, from wiring and fixture mounting to control system programming. Let Indy Electric illuminate your home or business with our professional lighting services.

Our Process

  1. 01 Step 1: Contact us for a free lighting consultation.
  2. 02 Step 2: We'll assess your needs and recommend the best lighting solutions for your space.
  3. 03 Step 3: We'll provide a detailed price quote and schedule the installation.
  4. 04 Step 4: Our skilled electricians will install your new lighting system efficiently and safely.

Benefits

  • Wide range of lighting options
  • Expert design and installation
  • Energy-efficient solutions
  • Enhanced aesthetics
  • Increased property value

Frequently Asked Questions

What are the benefits of switching to LED lighting?

LED lighting offers numerous benefits, including energy savings, longer lifespan, reduced maintenance costs, and improved light quality. LEDs also contain no harmful chemicals and are more environmentally friendly than traditional lighting options.

Can you install outdoor lighting to enhance my home's curb appeal?

Yes, we specialize in outdoor lighting installation, including landscape lighting, security lighting, and pathway lighting. We can help you create a beautiful and welcoming outdoor environment that enhances your home's curb appeal and security.

Do you offer lighting control systems?

Yes, we can install lighting control systems that allow you to easily adjust the brightness and color temperature of your lights. These systems can also be integrated with smart home automation systems for added convenience.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with lighting services? Contact us today.

Request Quote Or call: +13177466752
